title: AI 에이전트 CLI 심화
description: Claude Code CLI와 멀티 에이전트 파이프라인, 스킬 체이닝, Claude Market 스킬 개발 등 2026년 최신 에이전트 기술을 심층 학습합니다

resources.title: Anthropic 에이전트 및 도구 가이드
resources.description: Claude Code CLI 기반 에이전트 설계 원칙과 도구 사용 패턴

resources.title: Claude Market 스킬 개발 문서
resources.description: Claude Market에 스킬을 출판하고 수익화하는 방법

resources.title: 스킬 체이닝 아키텍처 패턴
resources.description: 여러 스킬을 조합하여 메가 에이전트를 구축하는 설계 패턴

resources.title: n8n + Claude 통합 가이드
resources.description: n8n 워크플로우에서 Claude 에이전트를 연동하는 방법

resources.title: 스킬 체이닝으로 메가 에이전트 만들기
resources.search_keyword: skill chaining mega agent Claude 2026 한국어

resources.title: 첫 번째 Claude Market 스킬 만들기
resources.description: 간단한 데이터 분석 스킬을 Claude Market에 출판하는 end-to-end 실습
resources.command:
# Claude Market SDK 설치
npm install @anthropic-ai/skill-sdk
# 스킬 초기화
npx create-claude-skill my-first-skill

resources.title: 스킬 체이닝 파이프라인 구현
resources.description: web_search → summarize → fact_check 체인을 구성하는 에이전트 실습
resources.command: pip install anthropic langchain && python skill_chain.py

resources.title: n8n + Claude 자동화 워크플로우
resources.description: n8n에서 Claude API를 트리거하는 완전 자동화 파이프라인 구축
resources.command:
# n8n 로컬 실행
npx n8n
# 브라우저에서 http://localhost:5678 접속

quiz.question: What is the primary focus of the Claude Code CLI in agent design?
quiz.explanation: The Claude Code CLI emphasizes multi-agent pipeline integration as a key aspect of agent design.

quiz.question: How can skills be monetized in the Claude Market?
quiz.explanation: Skills can be monetized in the Claude Market by publishing and selling them to users.

quiz.question: What is a key benefit of skill chaining in building mega agents?
options: Reduces the need for data analysis
quiz.explanation: Skill chaining enables the combination of multiple skills to automate complex tasks effectively.

practicePrompts.label: Build a Basic Agent
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a simple agent using Claude Code CLI.
practicePrompts.prompt: Design an agent that takes user input and returns a greeting message.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try adding a feature that responds to different user names.

practicePrompts.label: Skill Chaining Exercise
practicePrompts.instruction: Implement a skill chain with Claude.
practicePrompts.prompt: Create an agent that performs a web search, summarizes the results, and fact-checks one claim.
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with different search queries to see how the agent performs.

practicePrompts.label: Automate with n8n
practicePrompts.instruction: Set up an automation pipeline in n8n.
practicePrompts.prompt: Build a workflow that triggers the Claude API to analyze data and return insights automatically.
practicePrompts.followUp: Add an email notification step to inform you when the analysis is complete.

evaluation.prompt: Paste your output, command result, or notes here and AI will evaluate whether your learning result matches the lesson goal.
evaluation.context: This learning topic is "AI 에이전트 CLI 심화". Claude Code CLI와 멀티 에이전트 파이프라인, 스킬 체이닝, Claude Market 스킬 개발 등 2026년 최신 에이전트 기술을 심층 학습합니다
successCriteria: The learner completed a concrete practice step
The result matches the main lesson objective
The learner can explain or verify what happened
commonMistakes: Only reading the lesson without trying the practice step
Posting an incomplete command or partial result
Confusing setup issues with the lesson outcome
